german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Market Landscape
seniority.subtitle: Nearly half of the roles are senior, indicating a strong preference for experienced professionals.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over hybrid or remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 39% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Represented
industry.subtitle: A balanced pattern indicates diverse opportunities, but unclassified roles raise accessibility concerns.
